SQLScript:
WITH MaxEnrollFileID AS(
  SELECT MAX(FileId) AS MaxFileID
  FROM MemberEnrollment 
  WHERE FileLayoutDescription LIKE "%Member%Enrollment%"
)
,MaxMemFileID AS(
  SELECT MAX(FileId) AS MaxFileID
  FROM Member
  WHERE FileLayoutDescription LIKE "%Member%"
)
,SO AS(
  SELECT DISTINCT PlanMemberID
        ,StartDate
  FROM SpanOther so
      JOIN MaxEnrollFileID mef ON so.FileId = mef.MaxFileId
  WHERE so.FileLayoutID IN (3000, 3004)
    AND UPPER(so.SpanType) = "EXP"
)
,MemberEnrollmentData AS(
  SELECT 
     COALESCE(UniquePersonKey,PlanMemberID) AS MemberID
    ,CMSContractNumber AS ContractID
    ,IssuerID
    ,CASE
        WHEN MetalLevel = "B" THEN 6
        WHEN MetalLevel = "C" THEN 5
        WHEN MetalLevel = "G" THEN 2
        WHEN MetalLevel = "P" THEN 1
        WHEN MetalLevel = "S" THEN 3
        WHEN MetalLevel = "U" THEN 9
     END AS MetalLevel
    ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY COALESCE(UniquePersonKey,PlanMemberID) ORDER BY StartDate DESC) AS RowNumber
  FROM MemberEnrollment me
      JOIN MaxEnrollFileID mef ON me.FileID = mef.MaxFileID
)
,FullEnrollmentData AS(
  SELECT 
     BeneficiaryID
    ,RaceCode
    ,CASE
        WHEN RaceCode = "0" THEN "09"
        WHEN RaceCode = "1" THEN "01"
        WHEN RaceCode = "2" THEN "02"
        WHEN RaceCode = "3" THEN "06"
        WHEN RaceCode = "4" THEN "04"
        WHEN RaceCode = "5" THEN "09"
        WHEN RaceCode = "6" THEN "03"
        ELSE "09"
     END AS Race 
    ,CASE
        WHEN RaceCode = "5" THEN "11"
        ELSE "19"
     END AS Ethnicity
  ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY BeneficiaryID ORDER BY FileId DESC, EffectiveDate DESC) RowNumber
  FROM FullEnrollment
)
,MemberData AS(
  SELECT 
     COALESCE(m.UniquePersonKey,m.PlanMemberID) AS MemberID
    ,m.Gender
    ,m.DateofBirth
    ,m.LastName
    ,m.FirstName
    ,m.MiddleInitial
    ,m.MailingAddressLine1
    ,m.MailingAddressLine2
    ,m.MailingCity
    ,m.MailingState
    ,m.MailingZipCode
    ,m.PermanentAddressLine1 -- new 
    ,m.PermanentAddressLine2 -- new 
    ,m.PermanentCity -- new 
    ,m.PermanentState -- new 
    ,m.PermanentZipCode --new
    ,m.PhoneNumber
    ,m.CaretakerFirstName
    ,m.CaretakerMiddleInitial
    ,m.CaretakerLastName
    ,m.SpokenLanguage
    ,m.SpokenLanguageSourceCode --SpokenLanguageSource
    ,m.WrittenLanguageCode --WrittenLanguage
    ,m.WrittenLanguageSourceCode --WrittenLanguageSource
    ,m.OtherLanguage
    ,m.OtherLanguageSourceCode --OtherLanguageSource
    ,m.BeneficiaryID
    ,CASE -- Will add more case stmt once we receive data from source, current is null/empty
        WHEN m.EnrolleeEducation IS NULL OR m.EnrolleeEducation = "" THEN 9       
        ELSE 9
     END AS EnrolleeEducation
    ,CASE
        WHEN UPPER(m.EnrolleeEmployment) = "FT" THEN 1
        WHEN UPPER(m.EnrolleeEmployment) = "PT" THEN 2
        WHEN UPPER(m.EnrolleeEmployment) = "STUDENT" THEN 4
        WHEN UPPER(m.EnrolleeEmployment) = "RETIRED" THEN 5
        WHEN UPPER(m.EnrolleeEmployment) = "UNEMPLOYED" THEN 7
        WHEN UPPER(m.EnrolleeEmployment) = "OTHER" THEN 8
        WHEN UPPER(m.EnrolleeEmployment) IS NULL OR m.EnrolleeEmployment = "" THEN 9
        ELSE 8
     END AS EnrolleeEmployment 
    ,IfNULL(m.DeceasedDate, so.StartDate) AS DeceasedDate 
  FROM Member m
      JOIN MaxMemFileID mmf ON m.FileID = mmf.MaxFileID
      LEFT JOIN SO ON m.PlanMemberID = so.PlanMemberID
)
,EligibleMemberData AS(
  SELECT DISTINCT  
      COALESCE(nullif(mpb.UniquePersonKey,"None"),nullif(mpb.PlanMemberID,"None")) AS MemberID
    ,COALESCE(nullif(ompb.UniquePersonKey,"None"),nullif(ompb.PlanMemberID,"None")) AS OriginalMemberID
    ,mpb.BISInternalPersonId
  FROM MemberPersonBridge mpb
    INNER JOIN HedisEligibleMember hem
      ON mpb.BISInternalPersonId = hem.BISInternalPersonId
    LEFT JOIN MemberPersonBridge ompb
      ON ompb.BISInternalPersonId = hem.BISInternalPersonId
      AND ompb.IsOriginalMemberId = 1
)
,MemEnrollMPB AS (
  SELECT em.BISInternalPersonId
    ,me.ContractID
    ,me.IssuerID
    ,me.MetalLevel
    ,me.RowNumber
  FROM MemberEnrollmentData me
  INNER JOIN EligibleMemberData em 
    ON me.MemberID = em.MemberID
)
SELECT DISTINCT
     em.OriginalMemberID AS MemberID
    ,m.Gender
    ,date_format(m.DateOfBirth, "yyyyMMdd") AS DateOfBirth
    ,m.LastName AS MemberLastName
    ,m.FirstName AS MemberFirstName
    ,m.MiddleInitial AS MemberMiddleInitial
    ,m.MemberId AS SubscriberID
    ,Case 
        when IFNULL(m.MailingAddressLine1,"")="" then m.PermanentAddressLine1
        else m.MailingAddressLine1 end AS Address1
    ,Case 
        when IFNULL(m.MailingAddressLine1,"")="" then m.PermanentAddressLine2
        else m.MailingAddressLine2 end AS Address2
    ,Case 
        when IFNULL(m.MailingAddressLine1,"")="" then m.PermanentCity
        else m.MailingCity end AS City
    ,Case 
        when IFNULL(m.MailingAddressLine1,"")="" then m.PermanentState
        else m.MailingState end AS State
    ,Case 
        when IFNULL(m.MailingAddressLine1,"")="" then m.PermanentZipCode
        else m.MailingZipCode end AS Zip
    ,replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(m.PhoneNumber,"-","")," ",""),"(",""),")",""),"#","")  AS TelephoneNumber
    ,m.CaretakerFirstName
    ,m.CaretakerMiddleInitial
    ,m.CaretakerLastName
    ,m.SpokenLanguage
    ,m.SpokenLanguageSourceCode AS SpokenLanguageSource
    ,m.WrittenLanguageCode AS WrittenLanguage
    ,m.WrittenLanguageSourceCode AS WrittenLanguageSource
    ,m.OtherLanguage
    ,m.OtherLanguageSourceCode AS OtherLanguageSource
    ,m.BeneficiaryID AS MBI
    ,med.ContractID
    ,CASE WHEN fed.Race IS NULL THEN "09" ELSE fed.Race END AS Race
    ,CASE WHEN fed.Ethnicity IS NULL THEN "19" ELSE fed.Ethnicity END AS Ethnicity
    ,"21" AS RaceDataSource
    ,"91" AS EthnicityDataSource
    ,"" AS QHPIssuerLegalName
    ,m.EnrolleeEducation
    ,m.EnrolleeEmployment
    ,CAST(med.IssuerID AS bigint) AS IssuerID
    ,"" AS QHPState
    ,CAST(med.MetalLevel AS int) AS MetalLevel
    ,"" AS VariantID
    ,NULL AS APTCEligibilityFlag
    ,"" AS PlanMarketingName
    ,NULL AS MedicaidExpansionQHPEnrollee
    ,"" AS ReportingStatus
    ,"" AS EnrolleeEmailAddress
    ,NULL AS EnrolleePhone2
    ,NULL AS TotalEnrollment
    ,"" AS CaretakerEmailAddress
    ,date_format(m.DeceasedDate, "yyyyMMdd") AS DeceasedDate
    ,Case
        when ifnull(m.MailingAddressLine1,"")="" then "Permanent Address"
        when ifnull(m.MailingAddressLine1,"")<>"" then "Mailing Address"
        end AS AdditionalColumn1
    ,"" AS AdditionalColumn2
    ,"" AS AdditionalColumn3
    ,"" AS AdditionalColumn4
    ,"" AS AdditionalColumn5
    ,"" AS Filler
    ,current_timestamp() AS LoadDateTime
FROM MemberData m
  INNER JOIN EligibleMemberData em
    ON m.MemberID = em.MemberID
  LEFT JOIN MemEnrollMPB med
    ON em.BISInternalPersonId = med.BISInternalPersonId
    AND med.RowNumber = 1
  LEFT JOIN FullEnrollmentData fed
    ON m.BeneficiaryId = fed.BeneficiaryId
    AND fed.RowNumber = 1
order by memberid
